tagline: Yesterday's good news, bright and early.

stories.headline: Teenage Girls Dash Into Burning Home to Save Elderly Neighbor and His Memories
stories.summary: Four quick-thinking teens rescue 89-year-old from blazing house, then bravely re-enter to save irreplaceable family photos and late relatives' belongings.

stories.headline: Beekeepers Race to Rescue 20 Million Bees From Overturned Truck
stories.summary: Beekeepers abandon Sunday plans and coordinate heroically to save 75% of 20 million bees from crashed truck, defying impossible odds.

stories.headline: Community Rebuilds Navy Vet Chef's Kitchen That Feeds Homeless Neighbors
stories.summary: Navy chef Lamont Harris receives overwhelming support from volunteers rebuilding his outdoor kitchen destroyed by storms, a vital outlet for managing his PTSD while feeding homeless neighbors.

stories.headline: Medical Breakthrough: CAR-T Therapy Puts 90% of Patients Into Complete Remission
stories.summary: CAR-T cell therapy puts 90% of autoimmune disease patients into complete remission, with one lupus patient symptom-free for 18 months and no longer needing medication.

stories.headline: Vietnam Brings Extinct Deer and Elk Back to the Wild After 40 Years
stories.summary: Cuc Phuong National Park will reintroduce spotted deer and elk extinct in the wild for four decades, restoring ecosystems through dedicated conservation.

stories.headline: African Penguin Colony Grows to 790 Breeding Pairs, Bringing Hope for Endangered Species
stories.summary: Boulders Beach's penguin population adds 92 breeding pairs this year, offering real hope for this critically endangered species.

stories.headline: Flamingos Return to South Punjab Wetlands After Nearly 40 Years
stories.summary: A flock of eight flamingos returns to South Punjab's Rakh Khanpur Sanctuary after nearly 40 years, marking a conservation triumph for the region's restored wetlands.

stories.headline: DR Congo Rallies From Setback to Secure World Cup Knockout Spot
stories.summary: DR Congo defeats Uzbekistan 3-1 with a stunning second-half rally to secure their World Cup Round of 32 spot after nearly losing hope.

stories.headline: Neighbor's Surprise Gift of New Flag Reminds Homeowner That Kindness Thrives
stories.summary: Neighbor Jim surprises Florida homeowner Tim Chech by replacing his faded American flag with a new one, a gesture of kindness that deeply moved him.

stories.headline: Serena Williams Returns to Centre Court for Wimbledon Comeback at 44
stories.summary: At 44, Serena Williams accepts a wild card to play singles at Wimbledon on Centre Court for the first time since 2022, embracing one last opportunity.

stories.headline: Scientists Engineer Algae Robots to Fight Bladder Cancer With Precision
stories.summary: Scientists create 80-micrometre algae-based robots that deliver bladder cancer drugs directly to tumors in just 30 minutes using ultrasound guidance.

stories.headline: Rare Indian Grey Wolf Spotted in Tiger Reserve After Years Away
stories.summary: Camera traps in Amrabad Tiger Reserve capture images of a pack of five or six Indian Grey Wolves, a critically endangered species with only 3,000 remaining in India.
